privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wps_presentation_env brand_compliance_fix task by confirming that the presentation is a real Apache POI performance dataset (2411-Performance_Up.pptx) downloaded from GitHub. Verified all required string parameters against setup scripts and verifier logic. However, discovered a critical defect: the task claims to inject ALL CAPS violations into slide indices [4, 8, 13, 19], but slide 4 (1-based slide 5) is an image slide lacking a title text frame, causing the python injection script to silently skip it. As a result, only slides [8, 13, 19] are actually modified, and the verifier rewards 5 free points for slide 5 since it is naturally not ALL CAPS.
